sections.title: Thermal Equilibrium and Temperature
sections.content: Two systems are said to be in thermal equilibrium if there is no net flow of heat energy between them when they are brought into thermal contact.

am.title: የሙቀት አማካኝ ሚዛን እና ሙቀት
am.content: ሁለት ሲስተሞች በሙቀት ንክኪ ውስጥ በሚሆኑበት ጊዜ በመካከላቸው የተጣራ የሙቀት ኃይል ፍሰት ከሌለ በሙቀት አማካኝ ሚዛን ላይ ናቸው ይባላሉ።

om.title: Madaallii Ho'aa fi Hoo'ina
om.content: Sirnoonni lama yoo wal-tuqaa ho'aa keessa jiraatanii fi dhangala'aan ho'aa isaan gidduu hin jiru ta'e, madaallii ho'aa keessa jiru jedhamu.

definitions.en: A state where two connected objects reach the same temperature and stop exchanging heat.
definitions.am: ሁለት የተገናኙ አካላት ተመሳሳይ የሙቀት መጠን ላይ የሚደርሱበት እና ሙቀት መለዋወጥ የሚያቆሙበት ሁኔታ።
definitions.om: Haala wantoonni lama walitti qabaman ho'a walfakkaataa irra ga'anii fi ho'a wal jijjiiruu itti dhaaban.

eueeQuestions.question: When two systems are in thermal equilibrium, which macroscopic property must be identical?
eueeQuestions.explanation: By definition, temperature is the property that determines thermal equilibrium.
